title: Session 09 — Ambushed
bodyText:
**TL;DR: The party won the ambush at range, was spore-warned to *leave*, and camped by an underground river — where a curious myconid got engulfed by an ancient gelatinous cube.**

# What happened
- They won by keeping their distance.
- Deeper: thicker vines; **[[pc-brolin|Brolin]] and [[pc-eddy|Eddy]] inhaled spores** and heard a warning to *leave*.
- They found an old stone building by an underground river and camped.
- A curious **myconid** watched them — then began floating: engulfed by a nearly invisible, ancient, 15-foot **gelatinous cube**. [[pc-felson|Felson]] woke just in time.

# Fired / left smoking
- The spore warning to *leave* — unheeded.
- Cliffhanger: the myconid is inside the cube; [[pc-felson|Felson]] woke just in time.

# Threads
[[pc-brolin]] · [[pc-eddy]] · [[pc-felson]]
